creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
Also ${BUILD_DEPENDS} can be covered by:
> PEP517_BUILD_DEPEND=    ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}flit-core>=3.2<4:devel/py-flit-core@${PY_FLAVOR}
> PEP517_BUILD_CMD=       ${PYTHON_CMD} -m flit_core.wheel

Anyways, local poudriere-testport devel/py-ordered-set:
main-amd64-default: Pass
main-i386-default: Pass
13_4-amd64-release: Pass
13_4-i386-release: Pass
14_1-amd64-release: Pass
14_1-i386-release: Pass
14_2-amd64-release: Pass
14_2-i386-release: Pass

Can we please see some movement on this?
